data.title: A whale redeemed about 25,000 SOL and transferred it to Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale user has redeemed 25,008 SOL worth $3.7 million and transferred 25,000 SOL to Binance. The whale user has redeemed a total of 125,045 SOL in the past two months. It has been staking for 4 years. The whale user currently still holds 1,176,375 SOL worth $174.17 million.

data.title: Trump: The result of the appointment of the new Federal Reserve Chairman will be announced soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said in an interview with reporters that the appointment result of the next Federal Reserve Chairman will be announced soon, and he has a fairly clear idea of ​​the candidate. He added that a good Federal Reserve Chairman will lower interest rates. In addition, when asked if he would consider cutting government contracts held by Musk, Trump said he would consider everything. He said that there was no plan to talk to Musk and hoped that he would succeed in Tesla. (Jinshi Data)

data.title: Chainlink Price Prediction: LINK Whale Moves $5.8M, Raising Selling Pressure
data.description:
Chainlink (LINK) price has attracted attention recently following recent on-chain activity from whale 0x7fBB. Since May 27, 2025, the whale put 403,000 LINK tokens into Binance, costing about $5. 87 million. This has caused many to worry that a big sell-off by the investor could place pressure on the market
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/chainlink-price-prediction-link-whale-moves-5-8m-raising-selling-pressure/

data.title: Gate WCTC S7 enters the final 24 hours, more than 110,000 people compete for the $5 million prize pool
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Gate.io's announcement, the WCTC S7 World Cryptocurrency Trading Competition has entered the final 24-hour sprint stage, and the competition will officially end at 08:00 (UTC+8) on June 8. The number of participants has exceeded 110,000.
This competition includes team competitions, individual competitions, and random red envelope distribution activities, with a total prize pool of 5 million US dollars. The team champion will also receive a Ford Mustang GT sports car as a special reward.

data.title: Trump retweeted the news that "Meme coin TRUMP is Trump's performance tracker"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump forwarded the news "Meme coin TRUMP is Trump's political performance tracker" on the Truth Social social media platform, which pointed out that Trump not only accepted Bitcoin, but also vowed to make the United States the world's cryptocurrency capital. TRUMP provides retail investors with an opportunity to enter the bottom layer and express their preferences by buying and selling the Meme coin. If you don't like Trump, you can choose to sell it, and if you like it, you can choose to buy it. Therefore, the TRUMP token has become a new era barometer for measuring Trump and his policies. Although it cannot be said that the value of the TRUMP token is directly strongly correlated with Trump's approval rating, it may become a polling tool and a tracker to evaluate Trump's political performance.

data.title: Ethena-associated addresses transferred $28.4 million of ENA to Binance within 20 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, in the past 20 hours, 6 wallets have recharged 95.36 million ENA (worth 28.4 million US dollars) to Binance. These wallets all received ENA from the Ethena proxy wallet.

data.title: ALEX Protocol Faces Significant Loss Due to Security Flaw
data.description: According to Foresight News, ALEX Protocol has suffered a substantial financial loss exceeding $8 million due to a security vulnerability. The incident was attributed to a flaw in the self-listing logic of the protocol, which failed to incorporate compatibility checks for unsuccessful transactions. This oversight was exploited maliciously, resulting in the transfer of funds from the liquidity pool. The founder of SlowMist, Yu Jian, recalled a similar incident last year on May 25, when a private key leak led to losses in the millions.

data.title: Traders Turn Bearish on Bitcoin Following High-Profile Political Tensions, Data Shows
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) dropped sharply over the past 24 hours, nearing the $100,000 mark with an intraday low of $100,984. This price movement reflects increased volatility across the crypto market following a public exchange on social media between US President Donald Trump and Tesla CEO Elon Musk. Their clash appears to have triggered a wave of risk-off sentiment among traders. In response, the global crypto market cap slipped 4%, falling from over $3
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/traders-turn-bearish-on-bitcoin-following-high-profile-political-tensions-data-shows/

data.title: ETF Issuers Urge SEC to Reinstate 'First Come, First Served' Principle
data.description: According to PANews, ETF issuers VanEck, 21Shares, and Canary Capital have written to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), urging the reinstatement of the 'first come, first served' principle. This principle involves approving ETF applications in the order they are submitted to the regulatory body. The companies argue that the SEC's failure to adhere to this principle has hindered healthy competition and obstructed financial innovation in the crypto ETF market.
